_comment: Non-lambda List/Map stdlib batch. The .cases.json schema is single-entry per policy file; multi-rule fixtures register their primary entry (other rules verified manually in dev). Unlocked by: grammar fix (Map.get qualifier no longer dropped), Builtins.asList/asMap recognizing guest AsterListValue/AsterMapValue, BuiltinCallNode List.length/append fast-paths routed through asList, and CoreIrEvalCli entry-function selection.
